zh.Ilchester, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特易爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Luscote於1344年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親William Luscote30歲，母親Alice Archdeacon20歲。她於大約1367年與Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1396年1月31日在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.Ilchester, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特易爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Luscote于1344年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲William Luscote30岁，母亲Alice Archdeacon20岁。她于大约1367年与Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1396年1月31日在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Luscote was born in 1344, in Devon, England, her father, William Luscote, was 30 and her mother, Alice Archdeacon, was 20. She married Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne about 1367, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 31 January 1396, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Luscote est née en 1344, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Luscote, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Archdeacon, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne environ 1367, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 31 janvier 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Luscote 1344 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Luscote 30 und ihre Mutter Alice Archdeacon 20. Sie hat um 1367 in Cornwall, England Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 31. Januar 1396 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Luscote è nata il nel 1344 nel Devon, England, sua padre, William Luscote, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alice Archdeacon, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne circa 1367, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 31 gennaio 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Lanherne, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルランハーン
ja.lifeSummary: Joan Luscoteが1344年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父William Luscoteは30歳，母Alice Archdeaconは20歳であった。約1367年にイギリスコルンワルでSir John Arundell IV of Lanherneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1396年1月31日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Luscote(이)가 1344년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Luscote(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Archdeacon(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1367년 영국 코른월에서 Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1396년 1월 31일 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ilchester, Somerset, England: Ilchester, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Luscote nasceu em 1344, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Luscote, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Archdeacon, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne aproximadamente 1367, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Luscote родилась в 1344 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Luscote было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Archdeacon, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne около 1367 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 31 января 1396 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Luscote nació en 1344, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Luscote, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Archdeacon, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne aproximadamente 1367, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 31 de enero de 1396, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
